# atlassian_jira_status (Resource)

Manages a Jira Cloud status.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "atlassian_jira_status" "example" {
  name            = "In Review"
  status_category = "IN_PROGRESS"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the status.
- `status_category` (String) The category of the status. Must be "TODO", "IN_PROGRESS", or "DONE". Changing this forces recreation of the resource.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the status.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the status.
